🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to JPG in batch

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Converting one photo at a time is fine, but most people have a whole camera roll of HEIC files. This page is tuned for batches: drop dozens of HEIC photos at once and download them as a set. Since processing is local, large batches are limited only by your device's memory, not by an upload limit.

How to convert

  1. Select or drag many HEIC files at once.
  2. Wait for each to finish — progress shows per file.
  3. Use Download all to grab the whole set.

FAQ

Is there a file count limit?

There is no hard server limit because nothing is uploaded. Very large batches depend on your device's available memory.

Related converters

HEIC to JPGHEIC to PNGPNG to JPGWEBP to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
